name: A Teaspoon of Transcendence
description: An object of fantasy with countless definitions amidst an endless sea of stories. On the grand scale of the universe or the realm of dreams, there is no real difference between the holy sword of the brave warrior and the princess's teaspoon, or between the ice-cold clockspring and the key that will unlock the gates of transcendence...

upgrades.description:
ATK is increased by 28%.
Additionally, each time the equipping character hits an opponent with their Charged Attack, they attain "Transcendence" for a short time: their Stellar-Conduct DMG is increased by 16% for 5s. This effect can stack once every 0.2s, max 3 stacks.

ATK is increased by 35%.
Additionally, each time the equipping character hits an opponent with their Charged Attack, they attain "Transcendence" for a short time: their Stellar-Conduct DMG is increased by 20% for 5s. This effect can stack once every 0.2s, max 3 stacks.

Additionally, each time the equipping character hits an opponent with their Charged Attack, they attain "Transcendence" for a short time: their Stellar-Conduct DMG is increased by 32% for 5s. This effect can stack once every 0.2s, max 3 stacks.
